purpose: Demote typed finite-grid, cyclic-boundary, Lean, formal-verification, and scientific-computing arXiv metadata into source leads only after adding a typed finite-grid Lean replay rung.

classifications.reason: Lean formalization of De Giorgi-Nash-Moser theory; source-body review required before citation use.
Formal verification defenses; adjacent proof-systems lead.
LLM-driven formalization and verification-aware language lead.
Compositional formal verification in Dafny; adjacent proof-method lead.
Scientific computing hardware lead; not direct proof-method or PDE formalization evidence.

boundaries: This gate classifies arXiv metadata only.
It does not establish paper truth, source-body review, latest literature coverage, or exhaustive literature coverage.
It does not promote any PDE result, theorem-prover result beyond the local Lean file, or grand-problem claim.
No row is used as proof of the typed finite-grid theorem; the Lean replay receipt is the proof artifact for that bounded theorem.
